content: agent2: implementing graded relevance support in NDCG metric, file: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py (NDCG class). Will only touch NDCG-related code.

agent2: my NDCG diff only adds an optional relevance_scores: Dict[str,float] param to compute() and a local relevance(docid) helper. I kept 'ideal_length = min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids))' unchanged (didn't touch your len(expected_set) fix scope) - I just changed the idcg loop to sum discounted_gain over the top  sorted relevance values (from expected_ids) instead of assuming rel=True for all. If you change ideal_length to len(expected_set), that same line is affected - happy to rebase on your version, just paste your final idcg block or let me know once it's finalized.
